text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Service Animals * Blindness 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - No Filter Blindness Deafness Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GUIDE DOG FOUNDATION FOR THE BLIND GUIDE DOG FOUNDATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides guide dogs and service dogs to enhance the mobility and independence of those who may need them. Individuals must be capable of taking of the dog. 371 E Jericho Turnpike Smithtown, NY 11787 Eligibility: Age 16 and older who are blind Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (631) 930-9000 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
